description: A vertical agency-designed slogan/propaganda poster in a dark navy-blue color scheme. The background is an abstract 'digital/tech' motif of faint binary digits (0s and 1s), data streams, bar-chart and circuit-like graphics, evoking surveillance and data analytics. In the upper-left corner a solid blue box contains white serif text reading 'Making America Safe Again' (a riff on the MAGA slogan). Centered, large bold white sans-serif headline text reads 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens.' Along the bottom are two official seals with white labels: the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal ('U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services') and the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal ('U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'). The messaging technique uses official branding plus a tech/data-power aesthetic to project competence and inevitability of enforcement, framing immigrants as 'criminal aliens' to be hunted via data sharing. Target audience: general public / political base (signaling toughness) and, implicitly, a deterrent message to immigrants.
notable_text: Making America Safe Again / USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens
